title: [Submission] SwiGLU MLP (under 16MB)
author: Abhinav-Avasarala

data.description: Replaced the baseline ReLU² MLP with a SwiGLU-based MLP using SiLU gating.

novel_contributions: Replaced ReLU² MLP with a SwiGLU-based MLP
Reduced MLP width to fit under the 16MB limit
Added gradient clipping for training stability and quantization robustness
Used int8 quantization with zlib compression to achieve a ~13.6MB artifact
